extDesc.message: Save and restore named tab group profiles for any Chrome window.

applyBtn.description: Button to apply a profile to the current window

saveAsNewBtn.description: Button to capture current window as a new profile

overwriteBtn.description: Button to overwrite selected profile with current window

useAsIsBtn.description: Button to close popup without applying anything

openSettingsBtn.description: Button to open the options page

exportBtn.description: Button to export profiles as JSON

importBtn.description: Button to import profiles from JSON

schemaMismatchError.description: Error shown when imported JSON has wrong schemaVersion

legacyMigratedBanner.message: Your pinned tabs from AnchorTab v0.3 have been migrated to a profile called "Legacy Pinned".
legacyMigratedBanner.description: One-time banner shown after legacy migration

modeNormal.description: Badge label for a normal (non-incognito) window

modeIncognito.description: Badge label for an incognito window

noProfilesForMode.message: No profiles for this window mode yet.
noProfilesForMode.description: Empty state shown when no profiles match the current window mode

overwriteConfirm.message: Overwrite "$NAME$" with the current window's groups?
overwriteConfirm.description: Confirmation dialog for overwriting a profile

profileInUseError.message: This profile is already applied to another window.
profileInUseError.description: Error shown when a profile is already active in another window

focusExistingBtn.description: Button to focus the window where the profile is already applied

saveAsNewPrompt.description: Placeholder text for the new profile name input

saveBtn.description: Button to confirm saving a new profile name

cancelBtn.description: Button to cancel an inline action

applyError.description: Generic error message shown when applying a profile fails

optionsNewFromWindowBtn.description: Button to capture the current window as a new profile

optionsNewEmptyBtn.description: Button to create a new empty profile

optionsProfileNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for profile name input in options editor

optionsSetDefaultBtn.description: Button to set a profile as the default

optionsDeleteConfirm.message: Delete profile "$1"? This cannot be undone.
optionsDeleteConfirm.description: Confirmation dialog for profile deletion. $1 = profile name

optionsModeNormal.description: Normal window mode option in options editor

optionsModeIncognito.description: Incognito window mode option in options editor

optionsAddGroupBtn.description: Button to add a new tab group to a profile

optionsAddTabBtn.description: Button to add a tab to a group

optionsRemoveGroupBtn.description: Button to remove a tab group

optionsRemoveTabBtn.description: Button to remove a tab from a group

optionsAutoOpenPopupLabel.description: Label for the auto-open popup setting toggle (legacy, kept for compatibility)

newWindowBehaviorLabel.description: Legend for the new-window behavior radio group

newWindowBehaviorAutoOpen.description: Radio option: automatically open the popup when a new window is created

newWindowBehaviorBadge.description: Radio option: show a badge on the action icon instead of opening the popup

newWindowBehaviorOff.description: Radio option: do nothing when a new window is created

optionsImportConflictTitle.description: Title for the import conflict resolution modal

optionsImportConflictOverwrite.description: Conflict resolution option: overwrite existing profile

optionsImportConflictSuffix.description: Conflict resolution option: import with suffix appended

optionsImportConflictSkip.description: Conflict resolution option: skip this profile

optionsImportConflictApplyAll.description: Bulk action label for conflict resolution

optionsSchemaMismatchError.description: Error shown when imported JSON has wrong schemaVersion (options page)

optionsEmptyListMessage.message: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.
optionsEmptyListMessage.description: Message shown when the profile list is empty

optionsNamePrompt.message: Enter a name for this profile:
optionsNamePrompt.description: Prompt asking the user to name a new profile

optionsImportTooLarge.message: Import failed: file exceeds 5 MB limit.
optionsImportTooLarge.description: Error when import file is larger than 5 MB

optionsImportTooManyProfiles.message: Import failed: file contains more than 500 profiles.
optionsImportTooManyProfiles.description: Error when imported file has too many profiles

optionsImportTooManyGroups.message: Import failed: a profile contains more than 100 groups.
optionsImportTooManyGroups.description: Error when an imported profile has too many groups

optionsImportTooManyTabs.message: Import failed: a group contains more than 500 tabs.
optionsImportTooManyTabs.description: Error when an imported group has too many tabs

optionsImportUrlTooLong.message: Import failed: a tab URL exceeds 2048 characters.
optionsImportUrlTooLong.description: Error when an imported tab URL is too long

optionsImportNameTooLong.message: Import failed: a profile or group name exceeds 200 characters.
optionsImportNameTooLong.description: Error when an imported profile or group name is too long

applySummaryWithSkipped.description: Info banner shown after partial apply (some tabs skipped)

applySummaryAllSkipped.description: Error banner shown when every tab in the profile was skipped

optionsEmptyGroupBanner.message: {N} empty groups in this profile will be ignored
optionsEmptyGroupBanner.description: Info banner shown in the editor when the selected profile has groups with no tabs. {N} = count of empty groups

optionsExportEmptyGroupsConfirm.message: Export includes {N} empty groups across {M} profiles. Continue?
optionsExportEmptyGroupsConfirm.description: Confirm dialog before exporting when some profiles have empty groups. {N} = total empty group count, {M} = affected profile count

optionsConfirmCancelBtn.description: Cancel button label in modal dialogs

optionsConfirmOkBtn.description: OK / confirm button label in modal dialogs

optionsDeleteConfirmTitle.description: Title of the modal dialog that confirms profile deletion
